creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks strange and I cannot reproduce this problem.

For examples, rubygem-i18n-0.7.0,2.txz contains only:
/usr/local/share/licenses/rubygem-i18n-0.7.0,2/*
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/2.1/cache/i18n-0.7.0.gem
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/2.1/specifications/i18n-0.7.0.gemspec
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/2.1/doc/i18n-0.7.0/*
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/2.1/gems/i18n-0.7.0/*

It will not install any file to /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/2.1/doc/rubyzip-1.1.6/.
Then it cannot conflict with rubygem-rubyzip-1.1.6.
